🚀 Big Launches.title: Deutsche Telekom's AI-native telco
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI, transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Open source AI matters more than ever
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says open source AI is booming, with the company growing into a GitHub for AI, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Companies are done renting their AI
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says companies are moving away from renting AI and towards open source solutions, with the company's models being used by roughly half the Fortune 500.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Meta has removed a controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash, saying it 'missed the mark' and was not providing the intended creative tool.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft, with the company alleging misconduct by OpenAI's senior leadership.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Unveiling Public Opinion: A Study of Sentiment Analysis Using LSTM and Traditional Models
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study explores the use of LSTM and traditional models for sentiment analysis, with a focus on public opinion and social media data.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: From Solvers to Research: Large Language Model-Driven Formal Mathematics at the Research Frontier
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study examines the use of large language models for formal mathematics, with a focus on theorem provers and interactive theorem proving languages.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study presents a self-distillation framework for web agents, with a focus on verifiable environments and deep search agents.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Scalable and Culturally Specific Stereotype Dataset Construction via Human-LLM Collaboration
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study introduces a cost-efficient human-LLM collaborative annotation framework for constructing culturally specific stereotype datasets.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: When Debiasing Backfires: Counterintuitive Side Effects of Preprocessing-Based Stereotype Mitigation
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study examines the counterintuitive side effects of preprocessing-based stereotype mitigation methods, with a focus on unintended shifts in stereotyping or counter-stereotyping.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: A Multi-cluster Boundary Learning Method for Out-of-Scope Intent Detection via MiniLM Embedding
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study presents a multi-cluster boundary learning method for out-of-scope intent detection, with a focus on miniLM embedding and human-machine interaction systems.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: When Implausible Tokens Get Reinforced: Tail-Aware Credit Calibration for LLM Reinforcement Learning
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study identifies a critical failure mode in widely used critic-free RL methods, with a focus on tail-aware credit calibration for LLM reinforcement learning.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: A Reliability Assessment of LALM Audio Judges for Full-Duplex Voice Agents
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study reports the empirical reliability of Gemini models as audio judges for full-duplex agent conversations, with a focus on raw stereo waveform scoring.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Hallucination Self-Play: Bootstrapping Reinforced Detector via Evolved Generator
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This study presents a hallucination self-play framework for bootstrapping reinforced detectors via evolved generators, with a focus on LLM-generated outputs and faithfulness hallucinations.

tool_of_day.title: Wan-AI/Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B
tool_of_day.summary: A large language model released on Hugging Face, suitable for a wide range of NLP tasks.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards open source solutions, with companies like Hugging Face growing into a GitHub for AI, and companies like Meta removing controversial AI features after backlash, highlighting the need for responsible AI development and deployment.
